title: PAIK Component
description: A deployable/runnable unit of the project (a service, library, or job) and the single structured node tying its repository, API, environments, configuration, team, and dependencies together. See SPEC.md section 5.

repository_ref.description: Relative link to this component's source-repo document

provides_api_refs.description: Relative links to the api-spec document(s) this component serves

consumes_api_refs.description: Optional: relative links to api-spec documents this component calls but does not own

environment_refs.description: Relative links to the environment documents this component is deployed to

configuration_ref.description: Relative link to this component's configuration document

depends_on.description: Relative links to other component documents this one depends on

ticket_scopes.description: Optional: ticket-system scopes (epics, components) this component's work is filed under
